title: Tata Housing is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Tata Housing is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Tata Housing has an exciting opening for a Senior Property Advisor at our Srinagar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Tata Housing:
Tata Housing is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in GIS Tools

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Housing!
